name: DW · Dim Product
sql:
SELECT
    gs                                                                          AS product_id,
    'PRD-' || lpad(gs::text, 4, '0')                                           AS product_code,
    (ARRAY['Widget','Gadget','Gizmo','Thingamajig','Doohickey','Sprocket','Cog','Gear','Valve','Lever'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('PNM'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 10)]
        || ' ' ||
    (ARRAY['Pro','Lite','Max','Mini','Plus','X','Ultra','Eco','Prime','Neo'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('PSUF'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 10)]  AS product_name,
    (ARRAY['Electronics','Clothing','Food','Books','Sports'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('PCAT'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 5)]   AS category,
    (ARRAY['Acme','Globex','Initech','Umbrella','Stark'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('PBRD'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 5)]   AS brand,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('PSUP'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 150)       AS supplier_id,   -- FK -> dim_supplier (1..150)
    round((( ('x'||substr(md5('PCOST'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 20000)/100.0 + 5)::numeric, 2) AS unit_cost,
    round((( ('x'||substr(md5('PPRICE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 50000)/100.0 + 10)::numeric, 2) AS list_price,
    (ARRAY['Active','Active','Active','Discontinued'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('PSTAT'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 4)]  AS status
FROM generate_series(1, 200) AS gs
